It is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, infections, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Cyrtochilum × monacranthum include alkaloids, glycosides, and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
